title: Cryo Qubit Junction Layout: Sliver-Free Wire-Bond Pads
strategies: ring baseline: N pads equally spaced on a circle of radius 0.15 about the plate centroid (reproduces the checker baseline; min area is a thin 3-consecutive-vertex sliver)
multi-restart uniform sampling inside the unit triangle (reflect points with x+y>1 back into the plate), keeping the layout with the largest minimum triangle area, floored at the ring baseline

bottleneck-driven local search: from the best structured/jittered start, repeatedly locate the smallest-area triple and nudge/relocate one of its three pads inside the triangle, accepting only moves that raise the global minimum triangle area, over many seeded steps
structured Heilbronn-in-triangle constructions (corners + edge/interior lattices on the triangular plate, perturbed to break symmetry) tuned to avoid thin triangles everywhere
